headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Citigroup  analyst Nick Joseph   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $106 to $120.
